Appearances:
Plaintiff Rosemary Court Properties LLC is present. Represented by Tom McCornick.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Felicia Powell is present.
Attorney Selby Lighthill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of June - 25 -2012 is vacated.(501/JPT)
